MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: David Mendez, Atty for Plaintiff Dilip M. Patel

A. Russel Martin, Atty for Deft.
Elizabeth Eve Scott, Defendant

JUDGE PROTEM: David Watson; CLERK: E. Estacio; CSR: Patty Van Steenberge (306A)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. Case settled read into the record. Parties will execute a stipulated judgment to be entered. No writ unless deft fails to vacate by 4/2/04, 9 pm. Each side to bear own Atty fees and costs. If deft. does not vacate by 4/2/04, judgment will be entered in favor of plaintiff and against deft for all back rent and costs and atty fees. Trial date of Mar-15-2004 remains.
